examples: Polyester wadding was used from the 1970s until the present time.
We have decided on summer wadding.
A large box carried wadding and cannon balls.
The frock coat full of wadding, cut close to pull the figure into shape, gradually gave way to a looser but still precise jacket.
Workers cleaning a cannon, last fired more than 200 years ago, were shocked to find Friday that it was still loaded with gunpowder, wadding and a cannonball.
